compliance.note: OPERATOR OVERRIDE — real court-ordered listing data published on the public LP during the bridge period, before GVR WebAPI authorization. Standard rule is research-tier only (see scripts/scrape-foreclosure-deals.mjs header). Override accepted and directed by Amir Omidvar; flagged for managing-broker awareness (Shirin Saleh, licence #X031527) — CREA Code-of-Ethics / MLS display exposure on her licence. Photos: 6 listings have Paragon-authorized photos shipped 2026-05-16 and verified still-active via the 2026-06-11 aggregator scrape; 3 listings (Sullivan Heights Burnaby, South Marine Vancouver, Point Grey Vancouver) reuse on-file imagery from previously-active listings (College Park Port Moody, False Creek Vancouver, Park Royal West Vancouver — all closed/withdrew between 2026-05-16 and 2026-06-11) as REPRESENTATIONAL imagery of the area + property type, with alt text explicitly stating the imagery is representational rather than a photo of the specific listing. Across all 9: street numbers fully removed (street name + neighborhood only); MLS numbers omitted from public cards (retained in research dump foreclosure-deals.scraped.json); no listing remarks, no agent names. Replace this file with the GVR-feed-backed source once the WebAPI is authorized — IDX feeds license per-listing photos and auto-refresh, which is the permanent fix.

refreshHistory.note: refresh: 6 originals confirmed still active via scrape, 3 closed/withdrew (College Park Port Moody, False Creek Vancouver, Park Royal West Vancouver); replaced with 3 new listings from current aggregator scrape (Sullivan Heights Burnaby, South Marine Vancouver, Point Grey Vancouver), using the 3 vacated images as representational visuals with explicit alt-text disclosure
